content.full_text:
September 8, 1992

Fair Political Practices Division
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95808

Attn: Legal Division, L. Menchaca

Dear Ms. Menchaca:

Would you be so kind as to advise me on the following questions:

1. Am I prevented from serving on the planning commission in the city I reside in (Palm Springs), merely because I am a licensed California Real Estate Broker?

2. Also, please advise as to any conflicts that may apply to Real Estate Brokers?

Sincerely,

Tony C. Aguilar, Jr.
President-Broker
All American Properties
